form.formComment: Was among the placegetters latest at this track when a 4 length second but did clock a hot 23.83 for the 425m trip. Has the ability and looks hard to top.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Turned head inwards in home straight.

form.formComment: Most recent effort finished last on April 13 over 650m at Shepparton behind Midnight Phantom beaten 13 lengths (38.20) in a Restricted WIN. Didn't show up last start but give him another chance.
